title: The Economic Offences (Inapplicability of Limitation) Act, 1974
full_text: The Economic Offences (Inapplicability of Limitation) Act, 1974 आर्थिक अपराध (परिसीमा का लागू न होना) अधिनियम, 1974 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197412 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1974-03-27 Act Year: 1974 Short Title: The Economic Offences (Inapplicability of Limitation) Act, 1974 Hindi Title: आर्थिक अपराध (परिसीमा का लागू न होना) अधिनियम, 1974 Long Title: An Act to provide for the inapplicability of the provisions of Chapter XXXVI of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 to certain economic offences. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 01-04-1974 Schedule 1. Section 2. Chapter XXXVI of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 not to apply to certain offences. Schedule 1.
